name: Sasikumar Manickam
tagline: Sashi is all about People , Process and Technology
body:
### Welcome to My GitHub Pages.

### I am an Architect and a Development Manager by Profession and pizza person.
### Passionate about making new stuff like pizza.
### Web, Cloud, Big Data, and Analytics are most commonly used words in an any given of my day (and of course, PIZZA) 
### "All I care about is CHEESY PIZZA!"-my daughter
note: Don't delete this file! It's used internally to help with page regeneration.
